intro: The "Tsugunohi" series — a creeping everyday horror game with over 150M gameplay views! A sparkling new grad's fresh start is slowly consumed by terror―
description:
ABOUT THIS GAME
The daily-life horror series Tsugunohi, known for its simple “move left” gameplay, arrives on Nintendo Switch™ as
Tsugunohi -The Chamber of Phantom Name-!
The core gameplay remains the same: simply press the left key "←" to move the protagonist.
With no complex controls, you can fully immerse yourself in the eerie, realistic story crafted by ImCyan.
In this installment, you will wander between reality and illusion in a world both beautiful and bizarre.
Can you endure an even more refined level of horror?
Experience the evolved terror of Tsugunohi, brought to you by ImCyan.

STORY
A young office worker, Kana Sakuragi, begins her new life in the renovated old house Akembara House.
At first glance, it seems like a perfect home, but each night, strange phenomena begin to occur.
A suspicious manager, mysterious phantom character, and eerie origami—
Is this reality… or something else?

PROFILE
■ Tsugunohi Series
ImCyan is an indie game creator who has continuously developed numerous horror titles.
His most notable work is the Tsugunohi series.
The defining feature of the Tsugunohi series is its unique horror experience.
As you repeatedly walk “to the left” along familiar routes such as your way home or workplace, everyday life gradually distorts, and a deep sense of fear begins to envelop you—
Please enjoy the unsettling horror of everyday life slowly turning ominous.
